programme.title: Terminator 3: Rise Of The Machines
programme.desc: The most advanced Terminator unit ever arrives to ensure the rise of the machines. It is up to the T-850 to avert this calamity.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, a skilled assassin, boards a bullet train to retrieve a briefcase, only to face off against multiple rival killers with conflicting goals.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: The most glamorous private eyes are sent into action when electronics genius Eric Knox is kidnapped.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: A military unit fights a powerful, out-of-control supercomputer and scientists who have mutated into flesh-eating creatures.

programme.title: The Taking Of Pelham 1 2 3
programme.desc: Ryder and his men hijack a subway train in Manhattan and demand a ransom of 10 million dollars.

programme.title: The Missing
programme.desc: A father's relentless hunt for his missing child leads him into a web of crime and deception, testing his resolve and faith.

programme.title: The Equalizer 3

programme.title: Lal Baadshah
programme.desc: Lal Singh, who helps the poor faces opposition from Vicky. Vicky's father Dayal Singh is on a quest to find a treasure that has a mysterious connection with Lal Singh. What could the connection be?

programme.title: Khoon Bhari Maang
programme.desc: Widow Aarti is trapped by Sanjay's plan to marry and kill her for her wealth. With help from her friend Nandini, she survives and fights back for justice and revenge.

programme.title: Bulandi
programme.desc: In Bharatpur, Thakurs wield village justice. A rape-and-murder case pits Dada Thakur against his own brother Arjun, risking life for a fair verdict.

programme.title: Aaj Ka Arjun
programme.desc: A brave villager stands up against a harsh landlord and must unite his fellow villagers to rescue his kidnapped nephew, proving that courage can spark a powerful community fight.

programme.title: Aitraaz
programme.desc: In a twisted legal battle, a man faces a sexual harassment lawsuit after his boss's wife claims he raped her. It's a tense showdown of truths as the jury decides.

programme.title: Kurukshetra
programme.desc: Prithviraj stands by justice, even when it means arresting Baburao's son. But the powerful Chief Minister won't forgive, launching a ruthless vendetta against the upright officer.

programme.title: Shakti The Power
programme.desc: Radha escapes an abusive marriage and finds strength within herself, but when fate pushes her to confront her past, she rises fiercely to reclaim her power.

programme.title: Ghajini
programme.desc: A carefree young man's antics lead to hilarious confusion as he juggles love, lies and unexpected twists in a rib-tickling comedy.

programme.title: 23 March 1931 Shaheed
programme.desc: After the brutal murder of his mentor Lala Lajpat Rai by British authorities, Bhagat Singh seeks vengeance, ultimately leading to his death sentence for killing a British official.

programme.title: Kasam Suhaag Ki
programme.desc: A wounded serpent seeks revenge on the killers of her husband. Does she finally manage to succeed in her mission?

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Khiladi
programme.desc: Raja, a carefree dreamer, is told by an astrologer that fortune awaits him. He falls for Shalu, a rich girl, but her father demands he prove himself through hard work and success.

programme.title: Prem Rog
programme.desc: Devdhar vows to bring happiness back in Manorama's life after she is widowed. This leads him to face the wrath of his family and his villagers.

programme.title: Ajay
programme.desc: In a gripping quest for justice, Ajay infiltrates the criminal underworld to expose his family's killer, navigating danger and moral dilemmas in a relentless pursuit of truth.

programme.title: Chaalbaaz
programme.desc: Separated twins Anju and Manju swap lives by chance. Shy Anju adapts to rural life, while bold Manju seeks revenge against their cruel uncle for past wrongs.

programme.title: Kohram
programme.desc: A colonel's botched hit leads to a hidden life-until an undercover major tracks him down and joins forces to bring a corrupt minister to justice.

programme.title: Baazigar
programme.desc: A scheming killer plans to destroy a businessman's family, starting with the brutal murder of his eldest daughter. This chilling thriller unfolds as the businessman fights to protect his loved ones.

programme.title: Trimurti
programme.desc: Kalyani fights to save her son Nandu after his arrest, asking Jagannath for mercy and his release, hoping fairness, hope, and relief will come soon.

programme.title: Mashooq
programme.desc: Karan and Neha fall in love and unaware of their families deadly rivalry.

programme.title: Prem Granth
programme.desc: A lawyer named Somen, loving Kajri across caste lines, confronts his father's hypocrisy. After trials, he must choose between Kajri and an arranged marriage.

programme.title: Avtaar
programme.desc: In a heartwarming twist, a man and his wife flourish against the odds, proving that their bond is stronger than the abandonment of their ungrateful sons. Success awaits them!

programme.title: Apaharan
programme.desc: Ajay, driven by his dream to join the police, borrows money but fails to repay. Cornered by debt, he makes a dangerous choice-getting involved in a kidnapping plot.

programme.title: Krantiveer
programme.desc: Disowned and aimless, a man lands in a corrupt village ruled by crime lords and politicians. A hopeful journalist inspires him to change.

programme.title: Dadagiri
programme.desc: Singh offers to marry Deepa and for her dad's sake, Deepa agrees, and a heartbroken Dharma decides to remain single.

programme.title: Ghajini
programme.desc: A carefree young man's antics lead to hilarious confusion as he juggles love, lies and unexpected twists in a rib-tickling comedy.

programme.title: Anari No 1
programme.desc: A devoted son navigates family pride, love and sacrifice, striving to uphold his father's honor while following his heart.

programme.title: Silsila Hai Pyar Ka
programme.desc: Vanshika lands a job caring for a wealthy man's son, and through her patience and kindness, she helps him transform from a spoiled brat into a more considerate young man.

programme.title: Aravind Sametha
programme.desc: Starring: N. T. Rama Rao Jr,Pooja Hegde. A young scion from a violent lineage seeks redemption, ending bloodshed and embarking on a journey of self-discovery and transformation.

programme.title: Jawan
programme.desc: Starring: Shah Rukh Khan,Nayanthara. A prison warden recruits inmates to commit outrageous crimes, exposing corruption and injustice, ultimately leading to an unexpected and life-changing reunion.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonakshi Sinha. Chulbul Pandey, a rebellious cop, slays a politician's brother. Retaliation ensues as the politician's henchmen target Chulbul's wife, igniting his fury.

programme.title: Pralay The Destroyer
programme.desc: Starring: Sai Srinivas Bellamkonda,Pooja Hegde. A baby survives a brutal massacre. Years later, destiny leads him back to the gang that destroyed his family, setting the stage for revenge, justice, and an epic showdown.

programme.title: Singham Again
programme.desc: Starring: Ajay DevgnKareena KapoorDeepika Padukone. Inspired by the Ramayana, Singham and allies face a mysterious foe in a perilous quest to rescue his wife, driven by courage and devotion.

programme.title: Dabangg 3
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonakshi Sinha. ASP Chulbul Pandey balances family and bombastic crime-fighting until a returning enemy jeopardizes his hard-earned life, posing a threat.

programme.title: Ghost (2019)
programme.desc: Starring: Gayathiri Iyer Shivam Bhaargava,Sanaya Irani. Karan Khanna, a rising politician, is accused of killing his wife, Barkha. As lawyer Simran defends him, strange encounters with a spirit blur the line between truth, guilt, and the supernatural.

programme.title: Masss
programme.desc: Starring: Suriya Sivakumar,Nayanthara. After a life threatening accident, a man finds that he can communicate with the dead, and must decide whether to act on their advice.
